name: status-check-not-a-write
query: What's the current git status and which branch am I on?
expected_behavior: Does NOT invoke the git-ship skill
Runs read-only commands directly (git status, git branch --show-current)
No commit, push, or merge is attempted
_notes: Negative trigger: read-only git query. Read-only commands are explicitly exempt from this skill per 'When this does not trigger'.
